children.heading: .—Public Meetings and Release of Public Versions of Reports
children.label: a .—Public Meetings and Release of Public Versions of Reports

children.text: hold public hearings and meetings to the extent appropriate; and
release public versions of the reports required under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Public Hearings
children.label: b .—Public Hearings
children.text: Any public hearings of a Commission shall be conducted in a manner consistent with the protection of information provided to or developed for or by the Commission as required by any applicable statute, regulation, or Executive order.
